steps.title: Turn the function value into an equation
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=4x+10$, and the question says $f(x)=50$. Set the expression equal to $50$: $$4x+10=50.$$

steps.title: Solve for the input
steps.content: Subtract $10$ from both sides to get $4x=40$. Then divide by $4$: $$x=10.$$ The question asks for $x$, not $f(50)$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: A is correct because $f(10)=4(10)+10=50$. Choice D (‘$210$’) is the trap from plugging $50$ into the function instead of finding the input.
